title: ResponseObject
description: A response object allows serving synthetic responses directly from the edge without contacting an origin server.

name.description: The name of the response object.

status.description: The HTTP status code for the synthetic response.

response.description: The HTTP status text for the synthetic response.

content.description: The content body to return in the synthetic response.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the content body.

request_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers the response object.

cache_condition.description: The name of the condition that determines caching.
